title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 17–20, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18, Apoo, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #20 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see... so it doesn't live on this island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It only comes here to hunt..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was a safe full of food that had been recently tampered with

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we're the only ones on this island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you really still believe in that book of lies?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: There's no such thing as giants

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, I've read that a long time ago

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: depend- ing on our course, we might stumble upon it.

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 19 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
